channel.title: The Climate Digest
channel.description: Your weekly AI-generated briefing on sustainability, climate finance, carbon accounting, and non-financial reporting.
channel.itunes:author: ESG Digest

item.title: The Climate Digest — Week 13, 2026
item.description: This week’s digest covers India’s new 2035 climate pledge, SBTi’s updated FLAG guidance and automotive net-zero consultation, funding shifts in carbon removal, and new adaptation tools from Europe. Regulatory and market developments in carbon pricing, geothermal energy, and ocean innovation round out the briefing.
item.itunes:summary: This week’s digest covers India’s new 2035 climate pledge, SBTi’s updated FLAG guidance and automotive net-zero consultation, funding shifts in carbon removal, and new adaptation tools from Europe. Regulatory and market developments in carbon pricing, geothermal energy, and ocean innovation round out the briefing.
